scripts.postbuild: node scripts/write-version-json.js && node scripts/copy-investor-web.js && npm run validate:frontend-package
scripts.android:release:bundle: cross-env REACT_APP_API_BASE=https://api.errandbridge.com REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL=https://api.errandbridge.com REACT_APP_LOCAL_API_BASE=https://api.errandbridge.com REACT_APP_GRAPHQL_ENDPOINT=https://api.errandbridge.com/graphql REACT_APP_USE_DEVICE_API=false REACT_APP_FORCE_API_BASE=true REACT_APP_FORCED_API_BASE=https://api.errandbridge.com REACT_APP_CAPACITOR_USE_HOSTED_API=true REACT_APP_CAPACITOR_API_BASE_ANDROID= REACT_APP_CAPACITOR_API_BASE_IOS= npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew :app:bundleRelease
scripts.android:release:testers: npm run android:version:bump && npm run android:release:bundle
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:sync:android:local-api: cross-env REACT_APP_USE_DEVICE_API=true REACT_APP_DEVICE_API_BASE=http://10.0.2.2:8001 npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:android:hosted-api: cross-env REACT_APP_USE_DEVICE_API=false REACT_APP_FORCE_API_BASE=true REACT_APP_FORCED_API_BASE=https://api.errandbridge.com npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:ios:hosted-api: cross-env REACT_APP_USE_DEVICE_API=false REACT_APP_FORCE_API_BASE=true REACT_APP_FORCED_API_BASE=https://api.errandbridge.com npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:demo:android:local-api: npm run cap:sync:android:local-api && npm run cap:open:android
scripts.cap:demo:android:hosted-api: npm run cap:sync:android:hosted-api && npm run cap:open:android
scripts.cap:demo:android:localhost-api: npm run cap:sync:android:localhost-api && npm run cap:android:reverse:8001 && npm run cap:open:android
scripts.cap:demo:ios:local-api: npm run cap:sync:ios:local-api && npm run cap:open:ios
scripts.cap:demo:ios:hosted-api: npm run cap:sync:ios:hosted-api && npm run cap:open:ios
scripts.cap:dev:ios: npm run build && node scripts/set-capacitor-server-url.js --platform ios http://${CAPACITOR_DEV_HOST_IOS:-localhost}:${CAPACITOR_DEV_PORT:-3000} && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:dev:android: npm run build && node scripts/set-capacitor-server-url.js --platform android http://${CAPACITOR_DEV_HOST_ANDROID:-10.0.2.2}:${CAPACITOR_DEV_PORT:-3000} && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:bundled:ios: npm run build && node scripts/set-capacitor-server-url.js --platform ios --clear && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:bundled:android: npm run build && node scripts/set-capacitor-server-url.js --platform android --clear && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:sync:ios:localhost: npm run build && node scripts/set-capacitor-server-url.js --platform ios http://localhost:3000 && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:sync:ios:clear: npm run build && node scripts/set-capacitor-server-url.js --platform ios --clear && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:sync:android:localhost: npm run build && node scripts/set-capacitor-server-url.js --platform android http://10.0.2.2:3000 && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:android:clear: npm run build && node scripts/set-capacitor-server-url.js --platform android --clear && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:demo:ios: npm run cap:sync:ios:localhost && npm run cap:open:ios
scripts.cap:demo:android: npm run cap:sync:android:localhost && npm run cap:open:android
